summary.en: Indonesia references SNI harmonization paths for electrical safety and relies on BSN/JIS-referenced test baselines such as IEC 60335-2-40 in practice where air-source heat pumps and heat-pump-mode conditioners are assessed. Voltage/frequency compatibility is 220 V single-phase or 380 V three-phase at 50 Hz, which aligns with Chinese products for this product lane.
summary.zh: 印度尼西亚在电气安全上参照BSN体系并常结合IEC 60335-2-40等技术基准评估空调与热泵机型。电源电压/频率为220V单相或380V三相、50Hz，与本航线中国产品一致，通常不存在频率与电压差距。
summary.zht: 印度尼西亞在電氣安全上參照BSN體系並常結合IEC 60335-2-40等技術基準評估空調與熱泵機型。電源電壓/頻率為220V單相或380V三相、50Hz，與本航線中國產品一致，通常不存在頻率與電壓差距。

standards_or_laws: BSN technical references for imported air appliances

summary.en: China applies safety systems such as CCC and related GB safety standards for electrical goods, and shares 50 Hz operation but requires separate Indonesian safety evidence and marking for market access. Common test data cannot be presumed to satisfy Indonesia without review.
summary.zh: 中国通过CCC和相关GB安全标准进行电气合规，虽然共享50Hz运行条件，但市场准入仍需独立的印度尼西亚安全证据与标识，不可默认沿用。
summary.zht: 中國透過CCC及相關GB安全標準進行電氣合規，雖然共享50Hz運行條件，但市場准入仍需獨立的印度尼西亞安全證據與標識，不可默認沿用。

gap.en: The major gap is regulatory format and marking evidence, not fundamental frequency/voltage compatibility. Ensure Indonesia-facing test/label dossiers and responsible-party alignment are prepared in addition to shared technical baseline checks.
gap.zh: 主要差距在监管格式与标识证据，而非频率/电压本身。需在共享技术基准外补充印尼端测试、标签及责任主体文件。
gap.zht: 主要差距在監管格式與標識證據，而非頻率/電壓本身。需在共享技術基準外補充印度尼西亞端測試、標籤及責任主體文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where imported equipment and installation pathways are within Indonesian electrical safety scope
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under China CCC for applicable domestic-market products; evidence does not automatically transfer

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Electrical safety appears administratively mandatory for market access; 50 Hz and 220/380 V alignment reduces electrical incompatibility risk but does not replace Indonesian compliance paperwork.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 印度尼西亚市场接入通常要求电气安全合规，50Hz与220/380V一致可降低兼容风险，但不能替代印尼合规文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 印度尼西亞市場接入通常要求電氣安全合規，50Hz與220/380V一致可降低相容風險，但不能替代印度尼西亞合規文件。
